what_it_does: This file is a ledger/metadata record for a design-assets channel image named Switch_Gold, registering its blob reference, MIME type, declared dimensions, versioning, provenance, and links.
observations: Asset is in the design-assets channel with id/address/path all using icons/Switch_Gold
MIME type is image/png and blob is blob://b2:c5315a39ee82842c8f4a59e78d5aeb5b
Declared width and height are both 0
Source is dragnet and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Only version 1 exists, with empty alt text and no links
created and updated timestamps are identical
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata
id, address, and path are semantically consistent
Versioned record with blob pointer and author session
concerns: Zero width/height suggests incomplete ingestion or missing image metadata
Empty alt text may limit accessibility/context
Single version with no links leaves the asset isolated
notes: Asset ledger stub for a gold switch icon with unresolved dimensions and no alt text or relationships.
questions: What UI concept or object does Switch_Gold represent?
Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What is dragnet in this context: ingestion pipeline, tool, or author?
How is the blob resolved and are the true dimensions stored elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to catalog an image asset; actual content is a metadata record, but placeholder dimensions and empty alt text make it partially incomplete.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a named icon asset in a design-assets channel so it can be referenced via image://design-assets/icons/Switch_Gold and tracked across versions.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier, addressable URI, blob pointer, MIME type, and version history for a design asset, enabling lookup and provenance in a fused asset ledger.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a versioned metadata ledger for a PNG image asset named Switch_Gold in the design-assets channel, referencing blob b2:c5315a39ee82842c8f4a59e78d5aeb5b with zero declared dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog and make addressable a gold switch icon for use across design and code substrates.
